summary: New Blackmagic Streaming Encoder HD! Stream in broadcast quality HD to YouTube, X, Facebook, Twitch and more. Also works with Blackmagic Streaming Decoder to create a broadcast link or stream to Blackmagic Cloud! Available now for only US$569.

summary: DaVinci Resolve 20.3 Update! Adds support for 32K resolution on Apple M5 Macs for working with Blackmagic URSA Cine 17K 65 footage, plus improved timeline versioning with custom naming, new metadata options in the media pool and more! Download now from http://bmd.link/bhvx9u

Blackmagic Camera for Android 3.2 Update! Get support for custom live streaming configurations, as well as SRT streaming, H.265 live streaming and improved calibration for zebra and false color tools! Download now from http://bmd.link/xpaP7v

Blackmagic Video Assist 3.22 Update! This update adds support for Blackmagic RAW recording from Leica SL3-S, Sony FX3 and Sony FX30 cameras to Video Assist 5” and 7” 12G HDR models. Download now from http://bmd.link/rzA7xt

summary: Introducing Blackmagic PYXIS 12K! A new digital film camera that features the same sensor as URSA Cine 12K LF in the compact and easy to rig PYXIS design. Includes a massive 16 stops of dynamic range and with dual CFexpress media recorders. Only US$4,995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/tuyHXN

New Blackmagic 2110 IP UpDownCross 12G! A standards converter for live production and broadcast gives you the highest quality video conversion between all equipment with 2110 IP video, 12G-SDI, and HDMI connections! Only US$545! Learn more at http://bmd.link/WoN3F9

Announcing ATEM Mini Extreme ISO G2! Powerful new switcher with 8 HDMI inputs and high end broadcast controls in the ATEM Mini form factor. Plus, with Thunderbolt and 10G Ethernet, you get amazing replay and network storage! Available July. Learn more at http://bmd.link/vgPpbr

Introducing ATEM Micro Camera Panel! New portable camera control panel with high end broadcast CCU controls for ATEM switchers. Control iris, pedestal, shutter, white balance, master gain and more for up to 8 cameras from a single panel! Learn more at http://bmd.link/oiTAxP

New Blackmagic PYXIS Accessories! Blackmagic PYXIS Pro Handle and PYXIS Pro Grip transform Blackmagic PYXIS into a run and gun camera for broadcast and documentary work! Includes viewfinder, microphone, record/stop buttons and more! From US$119. Learn more at http://bmd.link/gmPqiE

Desktop Video 14.3 Update! This update is for all DeckLink, UltraStudio and Intensity models and implements camera extensions on Mac platforms, adds support for CVPixelBuffer as well as providing general performance improvements. Download now from http://bmd.link/i49Rz7

Introducing Blackmagic PYXIS Monitor! A new, versatile monitoring solution for Blackmagic PYXIS cameras with bright HDR touchscreen, camera control and multiple mounting points! Available soon from only $249. Learn more at http://bmd.link/uzTWr9

Blackmagic URSA Cine 17K Price Announcement! We have calculated pricing for our new large format 65mm digital film camera with RGBW sensor,16 stops of dynamic range and Blackmagic RAW syncing to DaVinci Resolve. It will be priced from US$29,995 and is available to order now with shipments starting later this year.

DaVinci Resolve 19 final release now available! Massive update with new AI tools, new color grading palettes and Resolve FX, Fairlight AI audio panning, DaVinci Resolve Replay, plus live media sync from URSA Cine, PYXIS and Camera App for instant editing and more! Download now! http://bmd.link/fuuAg3

Introducing Blackmagic Camera for Android! Add digital film features and controls to your Samsung and Google phones! Get high quality shots with the ability to adjust camera settings and upload footage to DaVinci Resolve editors worldwide! Available free from Google Play.
source_title: Blackmagic Design Camera App for Android

summary: New Blackmagic URSA Cine 12K! Revolutionary large format digital film camera with RGBW 36 x 24mm sensor, 16 stops of dynamic range and Blackmagic RAW syncing to DaVinci Resolve! Learn more at http://bmd.link/CbHJ9b

Introducing Blackmagic PYXIS 6K! A next generation digital film camera featuring a box or cube design that’s easy to rig. Features full frame 6K sensor, Blackmagic RAW and global media sync to Blackmagic Cloud. Available in June in 3 models with L-Mount, locking EF or PL mount.

Introducing DaVinci Resolve Micro Color Panel! New more portable model gives you all the control you need to create cinematic images. Includes a mounting slot for an Apple iPad Pro and connects via Bluetooth or USB-C. Only $US495! Learn more at http://bmd.link/3FLt43

Introducing Blackmagic 2110 IP Converters! New family of affordable 2110-IP video converters for broadcast and live production with models for monitoring, cameras and presentations. Available in May from US$295. Learn more at http://bmd.link/UfstuH

Introducing Blackmagic Media Dock! Now you can mount and share media over your network from Blackmagic URSA Cine camera media modules. Includes Blackmagic Cloud sync! Available now for US$1,995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/7PiPtU

New lower price for Blackmagic Video Assist! More affordable prices make it easier for everyone to add professional monitoring and broadcast quality recording to any SDI or HDMI camera. Save US$200 on all 3G and 12G models. Available now from US$325.

New Blackmagic Cinema Camera 6K! Next generation digital film camera with 6K full frame sensor with OLPF, L-Mount, CFexpress media, plus simultaneous Blackmagic RAW and H.264 proxy recording for cloud workflows! Only US$2,595! Learn more at http://bmd.link/jbwbhw

Introducing Blackmagic Camera! Get high end digital film camera controls on your iPhone! Adjust settings such as frame rate, shutter angle, white balance and ISO, then upload footage to DaVinci editors worldwide! Available from Apple App Store, free of charge.

Introducing Blackmagic Studio Camera 4K Plus G2! An updated studio camera 4K model that adds 12G-SDI and remote camera control via REST APIs for improved broadcast workflows! Learn more at http://bmd.link/4V79ek

New Blackmagic Micro Studio Camera 4K G2! The world’s smallest Ultra HD broadcast camera with 12G-SDI, upgraded 4K digital film sensor, cinematic color science, Blackmagic RAW recording and more! Available October for only US$995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/yuXYHi

model: Introducing Blackmagic URSA Mini Pro 12K OLPF!
summary: Introducing Blackmagic URSA Mini Pro 12K OLPF! The world’s most advanced digital film camera now available with a high performance optical low pass filter for cinematic virtual production! Learn more at http://bmd.link/JqAr9e
source_title: Introducing Blackmagic URSA Mini Pro 12K OLPF!

summary: Introducing DeckLink IP HD! A new family of PCIe cards that let you capture and playback up to 3 video channels direct to 2110 IP broadcast systems via 10G Ethernet! Learn more at http://bmd.link/xitPLM

Introducing ATEM Television Studio HD! A new family of compact live production switchers with built in broadcast control panel, 8 x 3G-SDI inputs, streaming, recording, multiview, DVE, keyers and more! Available now from US$2,995. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/atemtelevisionstudiohd

Introducing Blackmagic Studio Camera 6K Pro! A new, advanced Studio Camera 6K model with larger 6K sensor, popular EF lens mount, ND filters and built in live streaming so you can send an H.264 live stream over the internet back to the studio! Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagicstudiocamera

model: New lower price for ATEM Mini Pro!
summary: New lower price for ATEM Mini Pro! More affordable price now makes it even easier to build a streaming studio for broadcasting to a global audience on YouTube, Facebook and more! ATEM Mini Pro is available now for US$295 and ATEM Mini Pro ISO for US$495!
source_title: New lower price for ATEM Mini Pro!

summary: Introducing HyperDeck Extreme 4K HDR! 4K broadcast deck with advanced H.265 recording, optional cache, scopes, 3D LUTs, HDR support and touch screen interface! From US$2,995! Learn more at http://bmd.link/3AzFmf

model: New DaVinci Resolve 17 Fusion training videos!
summary: New DaVinci Resolve 17 Fusion training videos! In this new 4 part series developed by certified trainers, you’ll learn how to create cinematic visual effects and motion graphics using the powerful Fusion page! Watch all videos at http://bmd.link/7oVhEU
source_title: New DaVinci Resolve 17 Fusion training videos!

summary: Blackmagic Design Camera Update! Watch this video to learn more about the new Blackmagic URSA Broadcast G2 camera and Micro Converter 12G models. https://youtu.be/tGQCxhKk8hw

New Micro Converter 12G models! Introducing a new family of advanced 12G-SDI broadcast converters with support for 3D LUTs, HDR and formats up to 2160p60! Available now from US$109. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/microconverters

New Blackmagic Camera 7.4.1 Update. Get improved USB performance and stability when using Blackmagic URSA Mini Recorder with Blackmagic URSA Mini Pro 12K. Download now from www.blackmagicdesign.com/support

Announcing new Video Assist 3G models! New affordable models of Blackmagic Video Assist add large screen monitoring, better recording codes, scopes and focus assist tools to any camera! Available now from US$495. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagicvideoassist
New HyperDeck Studio 12G lower price! Advanced SSD broadcast deck with 12G-SDI for recording and playing back up to 2160p60! Now only $1,495!
